german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of positions remain accessible without German language proficiency.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Lead with Slight Edge
pm_type.subtitle: A narrow gap highlights a competitive balance between customer-facing and core PM roles.

seniority.title: Hiring is spread across multiple levels
seniority.subtitle: No single seniority group clearly dominates the current market.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of work is performed on-site, highlighting limited flexibility in work arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 31% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 26% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
